series_metadata.series_title: Master Settlement Agreement (MSA) Audits & Related Documents
series_metadata.series_description: Master Settlement Agreement (MSA) desk and field audits, reports, work papers, invoices, related documents and correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: 5 yrs expiration of calendar yr in which completed or such time as diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved a particular year. ; Electronic: 5 yrs expiration of calendar yr in which completed or such time as diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved a particular year
